untranslatable_reason: Broadening Wedge pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition (comparing high/low ranges across multiple bars and detecting diverging trendlines). No allowed indicator directly measures pattern geometry, trendline divergence, or pattern identification guidelines (Table 5.1). Pattern-based signals require visual/structural analysis beyond the allowed price-action and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent requiring market regime detection and directional breakout identification. Entry/exit conditions use pivot points and ADX as proxies for breakout confirmation. However, the core Broadening Wedge pattern itself (characterized by increasing volatility and diverging upper/lower trendlines) cannot be reliably expressed with available indicators. Implementation would require custom pattern detection logic external to standard indicator-based rules.
